headerDisplay: Transform your HomePod mini and Apple TV into smart sensors for HomeKit. **New in v1.6.0:** Apple TV Support! Power, Playback, and per-App sensors.

detectMusic.title: Detect Music
detectMusic.description: Trigger sensor when music is playing (Apple Music, Spotify, etc.)

detectPodcasts.title: Detect Podcasts
detectPodcasts.description: Trigger sensor when podcasts or audiobooks are playing

detectMovies.title: Detect Movies/TV
detectMovies.description: Trigger sensor when movies or TV shows are playing via AirPlay

maxDuration.title: Max Duration (seconds)
maxDuration.description: Maximum duration of content to detect. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes)

requireArtist.title: Require Artist Field
requireArtist.description: Only detect content that has artist metadata

updateInterval.title: Update Interval (seconds)
updateInterval.description: How often to check device status

name.title: Display Name
name.description: Friendly name for this HomePod. For stereo pairs, use the same name for both.

stereoPair.title: Part of Stereo Pair
stereoPair.description: Enable if this HomePod is part of a stereo pair.

name.title: Display Name
name.description: Friendly name for this Apple TV

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: Apple TV identifier from scan (remove colons/dashes).

companionCredentials.title: Companion Credentials
companionCredentials.description: Companion protocol credentials from pairing. See README.

airplayCredentials.title: AirPlay Credentials
airplayCredentials.description: AirPlay protocol credentials from pairing. See README.

enablePowerSensor.title: Power Sensor
enablePowerSensor.description: Occupancy Sensor that detects when Apple TV is on/off

enablePlaybackSensor.title: Playback Sensor
enablePlaybackSensor.description: Motion Sensor that detects when something is playing/paused

appId.title: App Bundle ID
appId.description: Common: com.netflix.Netflix, com.google.ios.youtube, com.disney.disneyplus, com.apple.Atv, com.spotify.client, com.plexapp.plex

detectPlayingOnly.title: Detect Only When Playing
detectPlayingOnly.description: If enabled, triggers only when app is actively playing. If disabled, triggers whenever app is open.
